## EventStoreDomainActivation Class

Represents the activation metadata for a single discovered domain, including convention\-derived DAPR resource names\.

public sealed record EventStoreDomainActivation : System.IEquatable<Hexalith.EventStore.Client.Registration.EventStoreDomainActivation>
